title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 490.510 - Proof of endorsement of notes
text:
490.510.  Proof of endorsement of notes. — Whenever it becomes necessary in any suit to prove an assignment of or an endorsement on any bond, bill or note, an affidavit of a competent witness, proving the same, shall be received as prima facie evidence of the facts stated in such affidavit.
(RSMo 1939 § 1857) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1693; 1919 § 5380; 1909 § 6324
